channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Reported gunshots at high school in Sarasota leads to investigation: SPD
item.description: Sarasota police are looking into reports of gunshots heard at Booker High School's parking lot on Saturday afternoon.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Second deputy leaves hospital, recovering from home after Ruskin ambush: HCSO
item.description: Both Hillsborough County deputies have been released from the hospital, after they were injured in an ambush shooting in Ruskin on Thursday.

item.title: [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Gunshots reported July 18 in Booker High parking lot, the latest

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Deputy shot in the face during Ruskin shootout leaves hospital: HCSO
item.description: A deputy who was left hospitalized after taking gunfire to the face earlier this week during a shootout in Ruskin is headed home.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Development chances increase for tropical disturbance in Gulf
item.description: Forecasters are monitoring Invest 91L in the Eastern Gulf, which now has a higher chance of developing over the next few days.

item.title: [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Powerball at $528 million Saturday, July 18, after National Lottery Day
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Florida Lotto for Saturday, July 18, just after National Lottery Day

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Dogs Inc. brings puppies in training to Tampa International Airport for socialization outing
item.description: Dozens of puppies in training walked the tarmac at Tampa International Airport Saturday as part of a socialization outing organized by Dogs Inc.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] World Cup final may avoid worst of wildfire smoke after storms sweep through
item.description: Thunderstorms are expected to improve air quality and clear much of the wildfire smoke before Sunday’s World Cup final in New Jersey.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] United Airlines denies allowing free flight changes over Trump airport name
item.description: United Airlines says passengers cannot change flights for free based on an airport's name, pushing back on a published memo.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Unexpected baby born at Brandon hospital shifts vacation plans for Rhode Island couple
item.description: A Rhode Island couple received the surprise of a lifetime when a medical visit for stomach pain revealed the woman was in labor hours before their planned cruise departed from the Tampa Bay area.

item.description: Sharks are taking over Tampa this weekend as the 12th annual SharkCon makes a splash.

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Iran-linked attack in Jordan kills 2 U.S. troops, CENTCOM says
item.description: Two U.S. service members were killed and another is missing after missile and drone attacks on an American base in Jordan, CENTCOM said.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] 3-year-old killed after being hit by truck in Winter Haven: PCSO
item.description: The Polk County Sheriff’s Office says it is investigating a fatal crash from Friday night that claimed the life of a 3-year-old girl.
